For collaboration

content:
•

For collaboration

: Give others only the fused output + commentary.

•

For publication

: Extract only GEN+ and USER_ORIG flags to build external-facing documents.

•

For personal research

: Keep the AVT (annotated version trail) to track your evolving thought.


⸻


[PRC03] — WORKFLOW MODES


•

EXPERIMENTAL

: Leave high variation and cross-links intact.

•

INDUSTRY-STANDARD

: Remove fluff, preserve only finalized changes.

•

ARCHIVAL

: Retain every version with diffs.

•

BUSINESS-FACING

: Generate clean PDFs and Obsidian/Notion folders from FID layer only.


⸻


Ready-to-Use Commands / Prompts



Prompt:

“Please compile all responses from this thread, remove redundancies, assign unique identifiers, and return a deduplicated, fused markdown doc with each unique section in its own code block.”
